_description: Mantine UI v7 component library. First-party hooks, CSS-in-JS via Emotion, no Tailwind dependency — use Mantine style props or CSS modules.

patterns.spacing: Mantine spacing scale: xs=10px, sm=12px, md=16px, lg=20px, xl=24px. Use style props (p, m, px, py, gap) or CSS modules for layout. Container uses size='xl' by default.
patterns.typography: Title and Text components. Heading sizes via size prop (h1–h6) or rem values. Color via c prop (dimmed, primary, etc.). Font configured in MantineProvider theme.
conventions: Import from @mantine/core — no shadcn/ui or Radix primitives
Prefer Mantine style props over utility classes
Use useMantineTheme() to read theme tokens in JS
Responsive style props: { base: val, sm: val, md: val }
Custom styles via CSS modules: import classes from './Component.module.css'
